dict.string: HelionCoder needs access to your Documents folder to open and manage projects.
HelionCoder needs access to your Downloads folder to open and manage projects.
HelionCoder needs access to your Desktop folder to open and manage projects.
HelionCoder needs access to removable volumes to open and manage projects on external drives.
HelionCoder needs access to network volumes to open and manage projects on shared drives.
